title: 10+ Hotguy and Cuteguy Glasses
description: Inspired by the Hotguy Comics Zine project | CustomModelData 1.21 / CIT 1.20
body:
> !!! You require MukiTanuki's Custom Roleplay Datapack for this to work -> [Download CustomModelData here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/custom-roleplay-data-datapack)
> 
> !! You need an item to hat Datapack if you want your glasses to have transparency -> [Download 1.21 Here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hats-on) | [Download 1.20 Here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/trigger-hat/)
> _(Other trigger hat datapacks could work, these are just recommendations)_


This resourcepack works for 1.20 and 1.21 versions if you use CustomModelData

This resourcepack only works for version 1.20 if you use CIT Optifine

The project is inspired by the Hotguy Comics Zine! All the different glasses are inspired by designs that show throughout the story <3

HOTGUY COMICS Zinethology is a digital, free-to-download, and collaborative zine that centers on the characters Hotguy, and his sidekick, Cuteguy; take a peek into the various adventures they share through the lens of multiple comic issues and short stories spanning the entire length of their superhero careers.

The story spans 400 pages and it's a very fun read. 
[[Download Zine on ITCH.IO]](https://hotguycomicszine.itch.io/hotguy-comics-zinethology)
[[Know more about the project in this CARRD]](https://hotguycomicszine.carrd.co/)


**GUIDE:**

- Make sure you installed CustomModelDatapack in your /datapacks folder (.minecraft > saves > world > datapacks)
- Load this resourcepack (.minecraft > resourcepacks)

Hold a **Carved Pumpkin** in your main hand and run the command: **_/trigger CustomModelData <Value>_**

Example: **_/trigger CustomModelData 1001_** will give you the heart glasses.

If you want your glasses to have transparency, hold a **Golden Nugget** in your main hand and run the command **_/trigger CustomModelData <Value>_**

Example: **_/trigger CustomModelData 1001_** will give you the heart glasses.

Then run **_/trigger hat or /trigger equip_hat_** to wear them. _(This command varies depending on the datapack)_

**LIST:**

CIT Name | Trigger Value

Cuteguy Hearts - 1001 or 1011

Cuteguy Glasses - 1002 or 1012

Cuteguy Sunset - 1003 or 1013
Cuteguy Visor - 1004 or 1014

Poultryman - 1005 or 1015

Hotguy Visor - 1006 or 1016

Hotguy Sharp - 1007 or 1017

Hotguy Sunglasses - 1008 or 1018

Hotguy Glasses - 1009 or 1019

Hotguy Sunrise - 1010 or 1020

(There's 2 options for each glasses, if you want them higher or lower over your character's eyes)
If you use CIT add a B after their names to have higher rise versions

Feel free to share your screenshots with me! tag me @_InkGhoul on twitter or ink-ghoul on tumblr
